text.title: Steerco Meeting Playbook Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 90-minute status read-out with no decisions captured.
antipattern.root-cause: Pre-read sent same-day; no ask list; meeting becomes verbal recap.
antipattern.fix: Cancel + send status memo; pre-read T-3; require numbered asks list.

antipattern.symptom: Asks framed as 'guidance on Z' rather than binary approve/reject/defer.
antipattern.fix: Rewrite asks as binary with named dates; reject vague forms during pre-read review.

antipattern.symptom: Verbal 'we'll capture it' substituted for the written memo.
antipattern.root-cause: Months later, parties remember meeting differently; PM cannot enforce outcome.
antipattern.fix: Block meeting close until memo template populated; send within 48h.

antipattern.symptom: Sponsor delegates to a junior; no quorum for the binary asks.
antipattern.root-cause: Decisions cannot be made; meeting must be re-run.
antipattern.fix: Escalate quorum to sponsor before running; if not resolved, cancel the forum.
